author: Koray Tugberk Gubur
title: AI & The Evolution Of SEO In 2026
content: LinkedIn post discussing the intersection of AI and SEO evolution in 2026. Koray Tugberk GUBUR shares insights on how AI is transforming search engine optimization strategies. The post features discussion on AI search and how it is replacing ranked results with single answers, and explains how brands can earn retrieval, citations, and user trust in an AI-driven search environment.
